title: Green (clone)
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Youmay|the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]|other uses of the word [[Green (disambiguation)|green]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Green
CT-53/21-8778 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|I|366|Green (2)}} |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Talon Squad]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Green''', designated '''CT-53/21-8778''', was a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], one of the many such clones created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to fight in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Like Fett, Green was 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. At the height of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in charge of [[Talon Squad]], a nine-man detachment. According to the Grand Army's [[Order of Battle/Legends|order of battle]], Talon Squad fell under the [[2nd Platoon]], [[Bacta Company]], [[Hawkbat Battalion]], [[101st Regiment]], [[7th Legion]], [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]], [[Second Army|2nd Sector Army]], and [[Systems Army Alpha]]. ==Behind the scenes== Green was first mentioned in ''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'', an article written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] and published in [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] in [[September]] of [[2005]]. In [[2008]], CT-53/21-8778 received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{1stm}} *{{CSWECite|I||Green (2)}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-53/21-8778#legends |es=CT-53/21-8778 |pl=CT-53/21-8778 }} [[Category:Clone trooper sergeants]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the 327th Star Corps]] [[Category:Members of Talon Squad]]
